ai_self_rating_note: Feedback JSON top-level rating field was null on this run — the AI packed '<parameter name="rating">7' into the summary body as XML-like tags (a known field-packing bug patched in the post-arc task.md update). The intended self-rating is 7.
wall_time_note: Includes a ~10-minute gap where the AI halted waiting on user input for the pre-export spot-check. Active-tool time was ~7 minutes. Future autonomous runs should not reproduce the halt.
baseline_note: Metrics vs. gold.csv (audited 2026-04-23). Gold = rows with on_topic ∈ {in, peripheral} (137 of 699 articles). Recall is trivially 1.0 since gold was derived by classifying the corpus — becomes meaningful when a later run adds on-topic articles beyond current gold (reach_beyond_prior_gold).
